audit_items.proof_trace: try_start_send() returns bool (not a pointer), so the property's premise—that callers must NULL-check a returned pointer before dereferencing it—is factually inapplicable. All three callers (async_send_message L99, trigger_send L152, on_write_some L331) either discard or propagate the bool return value; none dereference it. Internal pointer _sending_message is only dereferenced inside the guard if (get_from_pending_queue(...)), ensuring validity before use.
